# Eter News (by Eternalgy)

> Eter News (https://eter.my) is an independent bilingual news portal presenting completed news renders arranged by region in English and Chinese.

## Key Links
- Main Portal: https://eter.my/
- Rendered Editions: https://eter.my/read
- Published by: Eternalgy Sdn Bhd (https://eternalgy.me)
